opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Pet-trashed $800 sofa → fresh showpiece with a $47 cover
opportunities.before_state: Worn, pet-hair-covered, stained fabric sofa that embarrasses guests
opportunities.after_state: Clean, taut, fitted stretch cover in a neutral tone — looks like a new couch
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's maximalist/cover content is peaking and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-ROI affiliate play in the feed today.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Ugly laminate → faux marble counters for $28 — renters obsessed
opportunities.before_state: Chipped, yellowed, or outdated laminate kitchen countertop in a rental
opportunities.after_state: Seamless faux Carrara marble surface — indistinguishable in video
buyer_intent_keywords: peel and stick marble contact paper
opportunities.why_now: BHG is actively pinning marble, butcher block, and laminate countertop ideas today, surfacing buyer curiosity right before weekend DIY shopping.

opportunities.specific_product: waterproof LED outdoor bistro string lights 50ft
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dark patio → July 4th party space for $32 — takes 20 mins to hang
opportunities.before_state: Bare concrete or wood deck with plastic chairs and no ambiance after dark
opportunities.after_state: Warm Edison-bulb canopy overhead, fully ready for summer entertaining
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple explicitly pinned sub-$40 patio bistro lights today and HGTV is flooding the feed with July 4th outdoor entertaining content — 18 days out from peak purchase moment.

opportunities.specific_product: twin XL colorful comforter set + Eli & Elm side-sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare dorm bed → aesthetic bedroom for $65 — before move-in day
opportunities.before_state: Naked institutional twin XL mattress in a cinder-block dorm room
opportunities.after_state: Styled, colorful, personality-packed dorm bed that looks like an influencer's setup
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's college bedroom IKEA content is live today and June marks the start of the peak 6-week window when incoming freshmen actively buy dorm supplies.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Plain bathroom wall → faux wood accent wall for $38 — no one believes it's peel-and-stick
opportunities.before_state: Flat, boring white or beige rental bathroom wall with no character
opportunities.after_state: Realistic shiplap or reclaimed-wood accent wall that stops people mid-scroll
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy featured a renter today whose bathroom wood wallpaper went viral because followers couldn't tell it was peel-and-stick — exact social proof that drives Reel shares.
